Good link accessibility: 156/164 links are descriptive

checks.name: errors

No rate limit headers found
Server accepts DELETE on main page (no method validation)

checks.name: cost
findings: Page is ~234,656 tokens raw — very expensive for agents (>15,000 threshold)
Signal-to-noise ratio is 1% — most of the page is noise
Inline scripts/styles are 0% of page — reasonable
Max DOM depth is 21 — moderately nested
CSS class attributes consume ~27,642 tokens (12% of page)
Reading this page costs $0.29–$3.52 per load ($1.47–$17.60 for a 5-page session)
142 internal links — agents may waste tokens exploring

No skip links found — agents must traverse entire page to find content

21 custom elements made focusable via tabindex=0

Compact payload: 85KB
